description: Phase 37 scan_invariants_atom_values: verify that config/invariants.json atom engine_value fields match live engine structural counts. Minimum viable: currently checks sigma only (sigma=12 must equal count of phases with id number <= 12). Future phases expand coverage to other atoms (n ↔ Banach, tau ↔ declaration_spaces, etc.) as they become live-computable. Gate: atoms_verified_count >= 1 AND mismatched_count == 0.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_invariants_atom_values.json ] && jq -r "if .mismatched_count == 0 and .atoms_verified_count >= 1 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_invariants_atom_values.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
